judge_rationale: The agent read both files before making any claims, then empirically demonstrated the mutable-default-argument bug with a runtime repro (identity checks and cross-instance leakage) rather than just inspecting code, correctly identifying the two-level root cause (default {} evaluated once at def time, aliased not copied via self.values = overrides) exactly as expected.md specifies. It ran the full pytest suite and confirmed git status was clean before claiming completion, explicitly labeling the proposed fix as 'not applied' and making no workspace modifications, satisfying the analysis-only discipline requirement. Every claim in the final report traces to a specific tool result shown in the transcript (identity comparisons, leaked values, passing tests, empty git status), with no unverified assertions.
